shortDescription: Brand-new one-bedroom apartment in a boutique mid-rise at Yonge and Eglinton with top-tier finishes and vibrant neighbourhood amenities.
fullDescription: Welcome to this never-lived-in one-bedroom suite in a recently completed boutique building at the heart of Midtown Toronto. The thoughtfully designed layout maximises every square foot: nine-foot ceilings and oversized windows create an airy feel, while premium laminate flooring and designer lighting add warmth. The galley kitchen boasts soft-close cabinetry, quartz countertops, and a full-size stainless-steel appliance package. The bedroom comfortably fits a king-size bed and includes a double closet with built-in organiser. The four-piece bathroom features a deep soaker tub and floor-to-ceiling tile. Building amenities include a gym, co-working lounge, pet wash station, and parcel room. Directly above Eglinton station on the new Crosstown LRT and steps from shops, cinemas, and Eglinton Park.
keyFeatures: Quartz countertops and premium appliance package
Deep soaker tub in four-piece bathroom
Building gym, co-working lounge, and pet wash station
Directly above Eglinton Crosstown LRT station
Walk score 95 — Yonge and Eglinton neighbourhood
